'''Com Fordox''' was the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] during the crises of the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]] and [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Blockade of Naboo]]. After [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Valorum]] was [[Attack on Supreme Chancellor Valorum|attacked]], he visited Valorum along with [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]], [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and [[Orn Free Taa/Legends|Orn Free Taa]].<ref name="Cloak of Deception" /> Fordox [[Supreme Chancellor election, 32 BBY/Legends|nominated]] Bail Antilles for the Chancellorship.<ref name="Darth Plagueis">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}}
